items.title: Claude Code v2.1.120 Crashes on Startup
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

items.title: Elevated error rates on Claude Opus 4.7
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — The issue affecting requests to Claude Opus 4.7 has been resolved. Impact occurred from 01:24–01:59 UTC.

items.title: Issues with sign-ups on platform.claude.com
items.snippet: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

items.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.7
items.snippet:
[minor] resolved — The incident has been resolved. We had 3 blips of unavailability:
* 2:53 PT / 9:53 UTC -- 2:57 PT / 9:57 UTC
* 3:01 PT / 10:01 UTC -- 3:06 PT / 10:06 UTC
* 3:34 PT / 10:34 UTC -- 3:36 PT / 10:36 UTC
